output.code:
# Read the uploaded file
path = "/mnt/data/file-6Vb9RMhHc5uHq8hv3z8tgp-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

ayah = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا * وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
hadith = "إن الله تعالى يقول: يا ابن آدم، تفرغ لعبادتي أملأ صدرك غنى وأسد فقرك، وإن لا تفعل ملأت يديك شغلاً ولم أسد فقرك"
# Find all occurrences
def find_all(text, sub):
    indices = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(sub, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        indices.append((i, i + len(sub)))
        start = i + 1
    return indices

ayah_spans = find_all(text, ayah)
hadith_spans = find_all(text, hadith)
len(ayah_spans), ayah_spans[:5], len(hadith_spans), hadith_spans[:5]

print(text[-200:])
# find the last occurrence of the starting phrase and then identify the quoted content after the last opening quote
last_quote_idx = text.rfind('قال الله تعالى في سورة الطلاق: "')
last_quote_idx, text[last_quote_idx:last_quote_idx+100]

prefix = 'قال الله تعالى في سورة الطلاق: "'
start_partial = last_quote_idx + len(prefix)
start_partial, text[start_partial:][:50], len(text)

citations = []
for s,e in ayah_spans:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Aya"})
for s,e in hadith_spans:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
citations.append({"span_start": start_partial, "span_end": len(text), "span_text": text[start_partial:], "citation_type": "Aya"})
# Let's sort by start index
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
len(citations_sorted), citations_sorted[:3], citations_sorted[-1]
